description: Unified T0-T6 anchor timeline for temporal persona dialogue agents. Luo Ji's transformation is the primary alignment axis for later characters.

stages.name: 叶文洁出生 / 早期人生起点 / 《三体 I》主线人物活跃期
stages.agent_scope: Use for Ye Wenjie early life and Three-Body I active witnesses such as Wang Miao.

stages.name: 青年罗辑时期 / 老年叶文洁时期 / 危机初期人物活跃期
stages.agent_scope: Use for early Crisis Era characters whose active knowledge boundary sits before the Wallfacer phase.

stages.name: 罗辑面壁者早期
stages.agent_scope: Use for early Wallfacer-era personas and characters acting before later deterrence knowledge exists.

stages.name: 罗辑雪地悟道阶段
stages.agent_scope: Use only for characters with direct active persona evidence around Luo Ji's breakthrough period.

stages.name: 罗辑威慑建立阶段 / 末日战役、自然选择号逃亡、黑暗战役前后
stages.agent_scope: Use for Doomsday Battle, Future Fleet, deterrence establishment, and related active personas.

stages.name: 罗辑执剑人时期
stages.agent_scope: Use for Swordholder-era active personas. Dead characters should remain historical influence only.

stages.name: 罗辑死亡 / 罗辑晚年终点
stages.agent_scope: Use for late historical reflection or active personas that genuinely exist at this endpoint.

rules.anti_future_sight: Every retrieval and dialogue turn must identify timeline_stage before using character knowledge.
rules.no_mechanical_stage_generation: Generate only stages where the character has a real active dialogue premise.
rules.rag_filtering: Vector retrieval should filter by character and timeline_stage by default.
